plants.name: Dieffenbachia
plants.description: A tropical plant with large variegated leaves, popular for indoor decoration and low maintenance care.

plants.name: Calathea
plants.description: A decorative foliage plant known for its patterned leaves that move in response to light.

plants.name: Blue Columnar Cactus
plants.description: A tall, drought-tolerant cactus with a bluish tint, perfect for bright and dry indoor spaces.

plants.name: Monstera Deliciosa
plants.description: A trendy houseplant with large split leaves, ideal for adding a tropical vibe to interiors.

plants.name: Dracaena
plants.description: An easy-care plant with long green leaves, great for improving indoor air quality.

plants.name: Snake Plant
plants.description: A hardy plant with upright leaves that thrives in low light and requires minimal watering.
